query:
SELECT fp.created_by_id AS "user_id!"
                FROM forum_posts fp
                JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.created_by_id AND u.banned = FALSE
                WHERE char_length(fp.content) >= $1
                  AND ($2::TEXT IS NULL OR fp.content ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%')
                GROUP BY fp.created_by_id
                HAVING COUNT(*) >= $3
